data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding credential facts discoverability.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of keeping credential facts discoverable while documents remain restricted. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or documentation related to this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for discoverability but lacks concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement is being satisfied in the current saga run, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: Lack of evidence for validating the discoverability of credential facts while documents are restricted.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
